title: The Covid Vaccine  - A Christian Response
summary: To be effective as Christians, we must provide a Biblical answer to the challenge of  Covid-19.  In  this  case,  specifically  to  the  taking  of  the  vaccine.  Should  a Christian trust in the medical consensus that vaccination is the right thing to do? Or should we avoid the vaccine and simply trust God’s providence? On the internet one can find a multitude of voices on the topic, also from sources that  purport  to  be  Christian.  Some  of  these  are  pro  vaccine,  some  express (justified) doubts, and a small but vocal segment is outright anti-vaccine. The last group is a fertile ground for the wildest opinions. Some of these fall squarely in the camp of what can be called conspiracy theory. Unfortunately for the Christian seeking  honest  information,  many  groups  advocating  these  extreme  positions claim to have the Bible as their inspiration. This familiarity naturally predisposes us to give them the benefit of the doubt, which can lead to negative consequences for the uncritical mind. It is therefore the goal of the Bible study to separate the wheat from the chaff. We  will look at  the  matter as objectively  as  possible, and  apply  our God  given intellect, critical thinking, as well as our faith in the Word of God. It is my hope that with this article, seeking minds will be led in the right direction.
